summary: Fixing resource leak in shell completion by wrapping _resolve_context's make_context calls in 'with' statements

fields.summary: Fixing resource leak in shell completion by wrapping _resolve_context's make_context calls in 'with' statements

content:
type: STATUS
files: src/click/shell_completion.py,src/click/core.py
summary: Done: wrapped cli.make_context/cmd.make_context calls in _resolve_context with 'with' statements (ctx, sub_ctx, sub_sub_ctx) so contexts close and release file handles; updated Context.exit docstring in core.py. All 3 make_context call sites in _resolve_context are now inside with-blocks - if you need to add validate_nesting=False, add it to the make_context(...) kwargs at those same 3 sites.

fields.summary: Done: wrapped cli.make_context/cmd.make_context calls in _resolve_context with 'with' statements (ctx, sub_ctx, sub_sub_ctx) so contexts close and release file handles; updated Context.exit docstring in core.py. All 3 make_context call sites in _resolve_context are now inside with-blocks - if you need to add validate_nesting=False, add it to the make_context(...) kwargs at those same 3 sites.
